kpis.name: RRC Connection Establishment Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful RRC connection establishments to total attempts

kpis.name: RRC Connection Establishment Attempts
kpis.description: Total number of RRC connection establishment attempts

kpis.name: RRC Connection Establishment Failures
kpis.description: Total number of failed RRC connection establishment attempts

kpis.name: RRC Connection Re-establishment Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful RRC re-establishments to total re-establishment attempts

kpis.name: RRC Connection Re-establishment Attempts
kpis.description: Total number of RRC re-establishment attempts

kpis.name: DRB Setup Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successfully established DRBs to total DRB setup attempts

kpis.name: DRB Setup Attempts
kpis.description: Total number of DRB setup attempts

kpis.name: PDU Session Establishment Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successfully established PDU sessions to total attempts

kpis.name: PDU Session Establishment Attempts
kpis.description: Total number of PDU session establishment attempts

kpis.name: PDU Session Modification Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful PDU session modifications to total attempts

kpis.name: RRC Connection Drop Rate
kpis.description: Rate of abnormal RRC connection releases relative to total established connections

kpis.name: DRB Drop Rate
kpis.description: Rate of abnormal DRB releases relative to total established DRBs

kpis.name: PDU Session Drop Rate
kpis.description: Rate of abnormal PDU session releases relative to total established sessions

kpis.name: UE Context Release due to Radio Link Failure
kpis.description: Number of UE context releases triggered by radio link failure

kpis.name: UE Context Release due to HO Failure
kpis.description: Number of UE context releases triggered by handover failure

kpis.name: DL Packet Loss Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of lost DL PDCP SDUs to total transmitted DL PDCP SDUs

kpis.name: UL Packet Loss Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of lost UL PDCP SDUs to total received UL PDCP SDUs

kpis.name: Intra-frequency Handover Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful intra-frequency handovers to total intra-frequency HO attempts

kpis.name: Intra-frequency Handover Attempts
kpis.description: Total number of intra-frequency handover attempts

kpis.name: Inter-frequency Handover Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful inter-frequency handovers to total inter-frequency HO attempts

kpis.name: Inter-frequency Handover Attempts
kpis.description: Total number of inter-frequency handover attempts

kpis.name: Inter-RAT Handover Success Rate (NR→LTE)
kpis.description: Ratio of successful NR-to-LTE inter-RAT handovers to total attempts

kpis.name: Handover Preparation Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful handover preparations (X2/Xn) to total HO preparation attempts

kpis.name: Handover Execution Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful handover executions to total HO execution attempts

kpis.name: Handover Interruption Time
kpis.description: Average user-plane interruption time during handover

kpis.name: Ping-Pong Handover Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of ping-pong handovers (UE returns within short interval) to total HOs

kpis.name: Conditional Handover Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful conditional handover executions to total CHO attempts

kpis.name: DAPS Handover Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful DAPS handovers to total DAPS HO attempts

kpis.name: Handover Failure Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of failed handovers to total handover attempts

kpis.name: CBRA Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful contention-based RA procedures to total CBRA attempts

kpis.name: CFRA Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful contention-free RA procedures to total CFRA attempts

kpis.name: RACH Preamble Transmission Count
kpis.description: Average number of preamble transmissions per RACH procedure

kpis.name: RACH Average Access Delay
kpis.description: Average delay from first preamble transmission to Msg4 reception

kpis.name: Contention Resolution Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful contention resolutions (Msg4) to total Msg3 transmissions

kpis.name: Msg3 Retransmission Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of Msg3 retransmissions to total Msg3 transmissions

kpis.name: DL Cell Throughput
kpis.description: Average DL cell throughput measured at PDCP layer

kpis.name: UL Cell Throughput
kpis.description: Average UL cell throughput measured at PDCP layer

kpis.name: DL User Throughput (Mean)
kpis.description: Mean DL throughput per active UE

kpis.name: UL User Throughput (Mean)
kpis.description: Mean UL throughput per active UE

kpis.name: DL User Throughput (5th Percentile)
kpis.description: 5th percentile DL throughput per active UE (cell-edge indicator)

kpis.name: DL User Throughput (50th Percentile)
kpis.description: Median DL throughput per active UE

kpis.name: DL User Throughput (95th Percentile)
kpis.description: 95th percentile DL throughput per active UE

kpis.name: UL User Throughput (5th Percentile)
kpis.description: 5th percentile UL throughput per active UE (cell-edge indicator)

kpis.name: UL User Throughput (50th Percentile)
kpis.description: Median UL throughput per active UE

kpis.name: UL User Throughput (95th Percentile)
kpis.description: 95th percentile UL throughput per active UE

kpis.name: DL Data Volume
kpis.description: Total DL data volume (PDCP SDU level)

kpis.name: UL Data Volume
kpis.description: Total UL data volume (PDCP SDU level)

kpis.name: DL RLC SDU Volume
kpis.description: Total DL data volume at RLC SDU level

kpis.name: UL RLC SDU Volume
kpis.description: Total UL data volume at RLC SDU level

kpis.name: DL PRB Utilization
kpis.description: Ratio of used DL PRBs to available DL PRBs

kpis.name: UL PRB Utilization
kpis.description: Ratio of used UL PRBs to available UL PRBs

kpis.name: DL PRBs Used by Data
kpis.description: Average number of DL PRBs used per subframe for data transmission

kpis.name: UL PRBs Used by Data
kpis.description: Average number of UL PRBs used per subframe for data transmission

kpis.name: DL CCE Utilization
kpis.description: Ratio of used DL control channel elements to total available CCEs

kpis.name: UL CCE Utilization
kpis.description: Ratio of used UL CCEs to total available UL CCEs

kpis.name: Average Connected UE Count
kpis.description: Average number of UEs in RRC_CONNECTED state

kpis.name: Active DL UE Count
kpis.description: Average number of UEs with active DL scheduling

kpis.name: Active UL UE Count
kpis.description: Average number of UEs with active UL scheduling

kpis.name: Maximum Connected UE Count
kpis.description: Peak number of UEs in RRC_CONNECTED state within measurement period

kpis.name: DL Average MCS
kpis.description: Average DL modulation and coding scheme index (0–27)

kpis.name: UL Average MCS
kpis.description: Average UL modulation and coding scheme index (0–27)

kpis.name: DL Average CQI
kpis.description: Average DL channel quality indicator reported by UEs (0–15)

kpis.name: DL Block Error Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of erroneously received TB blocks to total DL TB blocks (initial transmission)

kpis.name: UL Block Error Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of erroneously received TB blocks to total UL TB blocks (initial transmission)

kpis.name: DL HARQ Initial Transmission Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of DL TBs decoded successfully on first HARQ transmission

kpis.name: DL HARQ Retransmission Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of DL HARQ retransmissions to total DL HARQ transmissions

kpis.name: UL HARQ Initial Transmission Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of UL TBs decoded successfully on first HARQ transmission

kpis.name: UL HARQ Retransmission Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of UL HARQ retransmissions to total UL HARQ transmissions

kpis.name: DL Average RB Allocation per UE
kpis.description: Average number of DL resource blocks allocated per scheduled UE per TTI

kpis.name: UL Average RB Allocation per UE
kpis.description: Average number of UL resource blocks allocated per scheduled UE per TTI

kpis.name: DL Spectrum Efficiency
kpis.description: DL cell throughput normalized by bandwidth

kpis.name: UL Spectrum Efficiency
kpis.description: UL cell throughput normalized by bandwidth

kpis.name: DL Average SINR
kpis.description: Average DL signal-to-interference-plus-noise ratio reported by UEs

kpis.name: UL Average SINR (PUSCH)
kpis.description: Average UL SINR measured on PUSCH by gNB

kpis.name: DL Average RSRP
kpis.description: Average DL reference signal received power reported by UEs

kpis.name: DL Average RSRQ
kpis.description: Average DL reference signal received quality reported by UEs

kpis.name: UL Interference Noise Rise
kpis.description: UL interference rise above thermal noise floor

kpis.name: UL Average RSSI
kpis.description: Average total UL received signal strength on PUSCH PRBs

kpis.name: DL Average RSSI
kpis.description: Average total DL received signal strength indicator

kpis.name: Beam Failure Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of beam failure events to total beam measurement intervals

kpis.name: Beam Failure Recovery Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful beam failure recoveries to total BFR attempts

kpis.name: DL Average MIMO Layers
kpis.description: Average number of DL MIMO transmission layers per scheduled UE

kpis.name: UL Average MIMO Layers
kpis.description: Average number of UL MIMO transmission layers per scheduled UE

kpis.name: DL MIMO Rank-1 Ratio
kpis.description: Ratio of DL transmissions using rank-1 (single-layer) MIMO

kpis.name: DL MIMO Rank-4 Ratio
kpis.description: Ratio of DL transmissions using rank-4 MIMO

kpis.name: CSI-RS Resource Utilization
kpis.description: Ratio of CSI-RS resources utilized to total configured CSI-RS resources

kpis.name: Average Active TCI State Count
kpis.description: Average number of active TCI states per UE

kpis.name: SCell Addition Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful SCell additions to total SCell addition attempts

kpis.name: SCell Activation Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful SCell activations to total SCell activation attempts

kpis.name: Average Active SCell Count per UE
kpis.description: Average number of simultaneously active SCells per CA-capable UE

kpis.name: CA Utilization Ratio
kpis.description: Ratio of UE-time with CA active to total connected UE-time for CA-capable UEs

kpis.name: Dual Connectivity Setup Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful EN-DC or NR-DC setup attempts

kpis.name: Cell Energy Consumption
kpis.description: Total energy consumed by a cell over measurement period

kpis.name: DL Energy Efficiency
kpis.description: DL data volume delivered per unit energy consumed

kpis.name: UL Energy Efficiency
kpis.description: UL data volume received per unit energy consumed

kpis.name: Cell Sleep Ratio
kpis.description: Ratio of time cell radio is in low-power/sleep state to total measurement time

kpis.name: DRX Active Ratio
kpis.description: Ratio of UE-time with DRX active to total connected UE-time

kpis.name: Transmit Power Utilization
kpis.description: Ratio of average TX power to maximum configured TX power

kpis.name: DL Packet Delay (Mean)
kpis.description: Mean one-way DL packet delay measured at PDCP layer

kpis.name: UL Packet Delay (Mean)
kpis.description: Mean one-way UL packet delay measured at PDCP layer

kpis.name: DL Packet Delay (99th Percentile)
kpis.description: 99th percentile DL packet delay (tail latency)

kpis.name: UL Packet Delay (99th Percentile)
kpis.description: 99th percentile UL packet delay (tail latency)

kpis.name: DL Jitter
kpis.description: Average variation in DL packet inter-arrival time

kpis.name: UL Jitter
kpis.description: Average variation in UL packet inter-arrival time

kpis.name: Cell Availability Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of time cell is operational to total measurement period

kpis.name: gNB Availability Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of time gNB has at least one operational cell to total measurement period

kpis.name: Cell Outage Duration
kpis.description: Total duration cell is unavailable within measurement period

kpis.name: DL RLC Retransmission Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of DL RLC retransmitted PDUs to total DL RLC PDUs

kpis.name: UL RLC Retransmission Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of UL RLC retransmitted PDUs to total UL RLC PDUs

kpis.name: DL RLC SDU Discard Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of discarded DL RLC SDUs to total received DL RLC SDUs

kpis.name: Xn Setup Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful Xn interface setups to total Xn setup attempts

kpis.name: Xn Handover Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful Xn-based handovers to total Xn HO attempts

kpis.name: E2E Session Setup Success Rate
kpis.description: E2E ratio of successfully established data sessions to total attempts

kpis.name: E2E Session Abnormal Release Rate
kpis.description: E2E ratio of abnormally released sessions to total established sessions

kpis.name: E2E DL Throughput
kpis.description: End-to-end DL user-plane throughput from UPF to UE

kpis.name: E2E UL Throughput
kpis.description: End-to-end UL user-plane throughput from UE to UPF

kpis.name: E2E DL Packet Delay
kpis.description: End-to-end one-way DL packet delay (UPF to UE application layer)

kpis.name: E2E UL Packet Delay
kpis.description: End-to-end one-way UL packet delay (UE application to UPF)

kpis.name: E2E DL Packet Loss Rate
kpis.description: End-to-end DL packet loss rate

kpis.name: E2E UL Packet Loss Rate
kpis.description: End-to-end UL packet loss rate

kpis.name: E2E Service Availability Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of time E2E service is available to total measurement period

kpis.name: E2E Handover Success Rate
kpis.description: End-to-end ratio of successful UE mobility events to total mobility events

kpis.name: E2E DL Spectrum Efficiency
kpis.description: E2E DL system throughput normalized by total system bandwidth

kpis.name: E2E Energy Efficiency
kpis.description: Total E2E data volume delivered per unit total network energy consumed

kpis.name: eMBB Slice DL Throughput
kpis.description: DL throughput for eMBB network slice

kpis.name: eMBB Slice UL Throughput
kpis.description: UL throughput for eMBB network slice

kpis.description: DL user-plane latency for URLLC network slice

kpis.description: UL user-plane latency for URLLC network slice

kpis.name: URLLC Packet Loss Rate
kpis.description: Packet loss rate for URLLC network slice

kpis.name: URLLC Reliability
kpis.description: Ratio of packets delivered within latency budget for URLLC slice

kpis.name: mMTC Connection Density
kpis.description: Number of simultaneously connected mMTC devices per km²

kpis.name: Slice PRB Utilization
kpis.description: PRB utilization within allocated slice resource quota

kpis.name: Slice Quota Excess Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of time slice resource demand exceeds allocated quota

kpis.name: SRS Resource Utilization
kpis.description: Ratio of used SRS resources to total configured SRS resources

kpis.name: Paging Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successfully paged UEs to total paging attempts

kpis.name: Paging Discard Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of discarded paging records due to capacity to total paging records

kpis.name: UE RRC_INACTIVE Ratio
kpis.description: Ratio of UEs in RRC_INACTIVE to total served UEs

kpis.name: RRC Inactive Resume Success Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of successful RRC resume procedures to total RRC resume attempts

kpis.name: UL Timing Advance Average
kpis.description: Average UL timing advance value (proxy for average cell radius/coverage)

kpis.name: PDCCH Blocking Rate
kpis.description: Ratio of scheduling opportunities lost due to PDCCH capacity exhaustion

kpis.name: UL PUSCH Power Headroom Average
kpis.description: Average UE power headroom on PUSCH (available vs required TX power)

kpis.name: DL PDSCH Scheduled Volume
kpis.description: Total data volume scheduled on PDSCH per measurement period

kpis.name: UL PUSCH Scheduled Volume
kpis.description: Total data volume scheduled on PUSCH per measurement period

kpis.name: IAB Backhaul DL Throughput
kpis.description: DL throughput on IAB wireless backhaul link

kpis.description: UL throughput on IAB wireless backhaul link
